chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P No.D-1275 of 2024 Alamgir Khan Versus Chief Election Commissioner and others DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S). For hearing of main case..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. Dated 16.10.2024 None present for the petitioner. Ms. Wajiha Mahdi, D.A.G. Mr. Abdullah Hinjrah, Deputy Director (Law) ECP. Mr. Sarmad Sarwar, Assistant Director (Law) ECP..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. Since last two dates the counsel for the petitioner is not attending the matter as he was called absent on 21.03.2024 when his brief was held by Mr. Hasnain Kamal, Advocate and so also on 11.09.2024 when no one appeared on behalf of the petitioner. Dismissed for non-prosecution. CHIEF JUSTICE JUDGE Ayaz Gul
